allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\(-not $py\){$py=\(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)}; if\(-not $py\){$py=\(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)}; if\($py\){ Write-Output \("Using: "+$py.Source\) } else { Write-Output "NO_PYTHON" })

Bash(py -3 -c "import ast,sys; files=['services/simulation_engine.py','services/market_data.py','routers/simulation.py','main.py']; [ \(ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\), print\('OK',f\)\) for f in files ]")
